MEMOS_DSN.description: Database connection string. Add a Railway Postgres service to auto-inject. Leave empty for SQLite (default).

MEMOS_PORT.description: Port Memos listens on (default: 5230). Railway injects PORT for routing.

MEMOS_ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Admin email for first-time setup. Set before initial deploy to pre-configure admin account.

MEMOS_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Admin password for first-time setup. Auto-generated — set before initial deploy to configure admin account.
